
EXAMPLES FOR CHAPTER 13 - "Color and Halftones".

The examples for this chapter require 53 KB.
			
Files contained in this folder:				
	Manifest
	arrays.ps (*)
	bright.ps
	cie.ps (*)
	cmyk1.ps (*)
	cmyk2.ps (*)
	gray1.ps
	gray2.ps (*)
	hilights.ps (*)
	hsbcone.ps
	hsb.ps
	hue.ps
	hueval.ps
	midtones.ps (*)
	ovrprnt1.ps (*)
	ovrprnt2.ps (*)
	rgbcube.ps (*)
	rgb1.ps
	rgb2.ps (*)
	rosettes.ps
	saturatn.ps
	separate.ps (*) (1)
	shadows.ps (*)
	spot.ps (*)
	trap1.ps (*)
	trap2.ps (*)
	ucr1.ps
	ucr2.ps (*)

(*)	Requires PostScript Level 2.

(1)	The line reading
		2.15 inch 0.15 inch moveto	%  position currentpoint
	in the book should read
		2.15 inch 1.15 inch moveto	%  position currentpoint
	The example on this disk has been fixed.
	

